solutions.name: CMPSE (Com-pose)
solutions.tagline: Enterprise AI + automation + software services firm founded 2019. Tagline: "Where transformation delivers results.™" Vlad Ljesevic (Co-Founder, Managing Partner) is Jason's contact and the connection point for any build engagement.
solutions.description: AI + automation + software services firm. Builds enterprise AI systems, custom software, and data platforms. Founded 2019. Vlad Ljesevic is co-founder and Jason's contact. Potential build partner for the physical-PHR to HIPAA-digital-ecosystem concept.
solutions.keyContact: Vlad Ljesevic (Vladimir Ljesevic) / Co-Founder, Managing Partner

solutions.name: Experience Onward
solutions.tagline: US-domestic licensed-psilocybin retreat operator (Oregon + Colorado) targeting athletes, veterans, and first-responders for TBI and trauma recovery. Founder Daniel Carcillo's own TBI-recovery story anchors the brand. Multi-day, in-person, high-touch ($4K-$10K+ per guest).
solutions.description: Licensed psilocybin retreat operator (OR + CO) founded by NHL alum Daniel Carcillo. Athletes / veterans / first-responders avatar for TBI + trauma recovery.

solutions.name: MedVectis (Healthcare Revenue Intelligence)
solutions.tagline: Official tagline:** "MedVectis delivers Healthcare Revenue Intelligence for medical practices -- maximizing revenue, reducing overhead through procurement savings, and optimizing employee health insurance benefits."
solutions.description: Healthcare Revenue Intelligence platform for medical practices. Maximizes revenue, reduces overhead via procurement savings, optimizes employee health insurance benefits. Natural distributor fit for PMC's RCM consulting offer.

solutions.name: Neural Cloud Solutions Inc.
solutions.tagline: AI-driven cardiology software partner. CardioYield (Holter analysis) + MaxYield (neural net). Strategic-partner / distribution opportunity for the cardiology vertical -- a sharper, narrower, more buyer-ready offer than the broader BRT modality positioning.
solutions.description: AI-driven cardiology software partner — CardioYield (Holter analysis) and MaxYield neural network. CSE-listed (AIML). BRT distribution / strategic-partner opportunity for cardiology vertical.

solutions.name: Quicksilver Scientific
solutions.tagline: Premium nutraceutical / wellness-journey product line. Practitioner-affiliate model. Replaces and supersedes the prior "Naba" framing -- Naba was the storefront layer; Quicksilver Scientific is the canonical entity.
solutions.description: Premium nutraceutical line (environmental detox, metabolic, hormone, cognitive). Jason's practitioner affiliate vehicle replacing the prior Naba storefront. Quicksilverscientific.com.

solutions.name: Weave (getweave.com)
solutions.tagline: All-in-one distribution + communications platform for wellness providers. Solves the dropped-call / missed-patient-recall problem with automated text follow-up and campaigns.
solutions.description: All-in-one practice communications platform for wellness providers. Call-no-answer autoresponder + custom text campaigns to drive patient retention and recall (new, recurring, returning).

solutions.name: AccuFit (Lutronic)
solutions.tagline: Non-invasive body contouring device using **Direct Electrical Muscle Stimulation (DEMS)**. Lutronic's answer to the Emsculpt/CoolTone category. Targets the same ICP as BRT (medspas, gyms, luxury wellness), so co-placement is natural.
solutions.description: Lutronic AccuFit is a non-invasive body contouring device using direct electrical muscle stimulation (DEMS) for muscle conditioning and fat reduction. Aesthetic device opportunity for medspas, gyms, and luxury wellness practices in Jason's network.

solutions.name: EarthFirst Organic
solutions.tagline: Organic whole-food supplement brand. Multivitamins, coffee, probiotics, glandulars, mushrooms, prenatal formulas. DTC e-commerce (Shopify storefront) with subscribe-and-save (40% off first order, 20% off recurring + free shipping). Founded around "regenerative agriculture" positioning -- "Nourish Your Body, Nourish Your Earth."
solutions.description: Whole-food organic multivitamin and supplement brand (multivitamins, coffee, probiotics, glandulars, mushrooms). Direct-to-consumer subscribe-and-save model. Complementary to Quicksilver Scientific nutraceutical line for the wellness audience.

solutions.name: PLAUD AI
solutions.tagline: AI-powered voice recorder device for doctors and clinicians. Captures conversations and renders structured notes / summaries. Distributorship opportunity in formation.
solutions.description: AI-powered voice recorder / meeting capture device for clinicians. Distributorship opportunity in formation. More information to come.
